_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the macro-not-found branch of the excel-activities/execute-macro-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (Cannot run the macro 'RunImport' COMException) → jobs logs (VBA-module enumeration shows Module1.ProcessData and Module2.UpdateReport, neither matches 'RunImport') → workflow source. The enumeration evidence + configured-name contrast distinguishes branch 1 from branch 5 (Trust Center).
